title: Mido-shonun's Tokyo Ghoul Revived
description: This mod aims to add the world of Tokyo Ghoul (Both Anime and Manga) to Minecraft. Adds Ghouls, Humans, Hybrids. Quinques, Aratas, Kagunes, Kakujas. Foods, Blocks, Items, and Quests/Storyline. Join groups, get paid, or become the One Eyed King.
body:
Tokyo Ghoul is an anime and manga where the world is full of Humans and Ghouls. Ghouls cannot eat Human food, and instead have to eat human flesh in order to survive. Ken Kaneki, the main character, gets surgery where his organ's are replaced with Rize's organ's, who is a Ghoul. This turns Kaneki into the first experimental One Eyed Ghoul. Ghoul's have a natural weapon called a Kagune. There's a group of Human's called the CCG, who use weapons called Quinque's and armor called Arata's to fight and hunt Ghoul's.

In this mod, you can be a Human and join the CCG, and get your own Quinque and use it to level up and get stronger. If you want to, you can be a Ghoul, and eat Human's and other Ghoul's to level up your Kagune and even get a Kakuja. As a Ghoul, you could join Anteiku and get food without killing, or you can join Aogiri and use it to get stronger. As a Human, you could eat Ghoul Organs to become a One Eyed Ghoul, which are more powerful than regular Ghoul's. You can also do the story, having 3 versions for each species.

This adds item's, weapon's, entities, structure's, armor and a lot of other stuff, all based off of Tokyo Ghoul.

This was made with MCreator, and is for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1

As of right now, it does not have much.

THIS MOD (Currently) REQUIRES:

Kleiders Custom Renderer

Curios

LATER:

Player Animator

Geckolib

Pehkui
